render-tests/terrain/default: 3D terrain Metal-only: the DEM sampled in the terrain vertex shader decodes to garbage (huge elevation clips the mesh) while the same texture reads correctly in fragment shaders (color-relief passes). Needs a Metal GPU capture to confirm the vertex-stage DEM texture binding. Renders correctly on GL/Vulkan.
render-tests/terrain/pitched-world: 3D terrain Metal-only, see terrain/default: vertex-stage DEM read is wrong on Metal; renders on GL/Vulkan.
